issue_summary: Support multi-value fields in range facet counting
javadoc_before:
/** * Create {@code RangeFacetCounts}, using {@link DoubleValues} from the specified field. * *

N.B This assumes that the field was indexed with {@link * org.apache.lucene.document.DoubleDocValuesField}. For float-valued fields, use {@link * #DoubleRangeFacetCounts(String, DoubleValuesSource, FacetsCollector, DoubleRange...)} */
javadoc_after:
/** * Create {@code RangeFacetCounts}, using double value from the specified field. The field may be * single-valued ({@link NumericDocValues}) or multi-valued ({@link SortedNumericDocValues}), and * will be interpreted as containing double values. * *

N.B This assumes that the field was indexed with {@link * org.apache.lucene.document.DoubleDocValuesField}. For float-valued fields, use {@link * #DoubleRangeFacetCounts(String, DoubleValuesSource, FacetsCollector, DoubleRange...)} * *

TODO: Extend multi-valued support to fields that have been indexed as float values */
